description: Deterministic display rules for WeatherChart interpretation cards. These are editorial UI rules, not safety advice.

yellow.label: Yellow warning
yellow.action: Read the official warning and adjust plans where affected.

amber.label: Amber warning
amber.action: Expect disruption and follow official instructions.

red.label: Red warning
red.action: Take action now and follow official emergency guidance.

rules.headline: Very poor visibility
rules.advice: Slow down, use appropriate lights, and check official travel advice.

rules.headline: Strong gusts possible
rules.advice: Secure loose items and take care on exposed routes.

rules.headline: A wet spell
rules.advice: Take waterproofs and allow extra time where surface water develops.

rules.headline: Showers are likely
rules.advice: Keep a waterproof layer handy and check the hourly chart.

rules.headline: Hot conditions
rules.advice: Carry water, seek shade, and check current health guidance.

rules.headline: Feeling cold
rules.advice: Add warm layers and watch for local frost or ice information.

rules.headline: Mostly settled
rules.advice: Rain is less likely, but the forecast can still change.

rules.headline: Mixed conditions
rules.advice: Use the hourly detail to time your plans.

labels.precipitationProbability: Chance of precipitation at this location and time
labels.feelsLikeC: How the air may feel after wind and humidity are considered
